description: Style NoteStretchy and comfy room-to-grow style t-shirt from marvel Comics, a pint-sized version of his dad's T-shirt. The go-to piece for summertime games and fun, this tee will last longer than his scruffy escapades!Product DetailsGrey and navy blue round neck t-shirt, has short sleeves with snipped edges, graphic and rubber print on the front, applique on the left sleeve, brand tag on the left hem and snipped edges on the hemMaterial and Care100% CottonHand wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededLine dryCool iron; do not iron on decorationsDo not dry clean
